rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF IGOR PAUL LEBEDEFF
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Determine Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 03/12/2025. Please file a supplemet or other paper addressing the following issue no later than 03/10/2025 before noon: The translator's certificates of accuracy did not include language required by CCP section 2015.5(b) to qualify as "declarations". A declaration under CCP 2015.5 is given the same force and effect as an affidavit under that section. An affidavit is acceptable as evidence in an uncontested probate proceeding. See Probate Code sections 1022 & 1000(a); see also CCP section 2009. An affidavit taken before a notary public in another state is acceptable as evidence in California. See CCP section 2013. However, the translator's certificates of accuracy were not notarized in accordance with New York law.
